description: Style NoteDon that sporty look with Swoosh cap from nike. Made of Dri-Fit fabric, this cap ensures your head is absolutely sweat-free all day long.Product DetailsOrange cap made of polyester and spandex blended fabric, mesh on the sides for ventilation, adjustable velcro back strap, Nike swoosh logo appliqued on the front and curved visor with stitch detailingMaterial and CareBody: 100% polyester and insets: 92% polyester and 2% spandexMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry on lowCool ironDo not iron on design or dry clean
